Fields.Name: Sound Bank ID
Fields.Description: Sound bank ID (-1: no bank, other: bank with specified ID)

Fields.Name: Sound Break SE ID
Fields.Description: Destruction sound SEID (9 digits) -1: Generated from assetId

Fields.Name: Draw Param Reference ID
Fields.Description: Drawing parameter reference ID. The reference ID for the part drawing parameter .xlsm.

Fields.Name: Hit Create Type
Fields.Description: Sets the hit build type for static assets. Ignored for dynamic assets.

Fields.Name: Asset Behavior Type
Fields.Description: Dynamic (all asset features available), static (light assets with limited functionality treated as old maps), partially static (partially destroyed assets)

Fields.Name: Collision Detection Type
Fields.Description: Collision detection type. You can set what the asset will hit.

Fields.Name: Rain Blocking Type
Fields.Description: It is a type of rain blocking. You can set the blocking of SFX and wet expression.

Fields.Name: HP
Fields.Description: Durability until destruction (-1: Indestructible)

Fields.Name: Defence
Fields.Description: Attack power below this value is no damage

Fields.Name: Destruction Stop Time
Fields.Description: Time from destruction to forced stop of rigid body (do not force stop at 0)

Fields.Name: Destruction SFX ID
Fields.Description: SFX ID on destruction (-1: default (810030))

Fields.Name: Destruction SFX Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: SFX generation position at the time of destruction Damipoly ID (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Destruction Landing SFX ID
Fields.Description: Object material-dependent SFX identifier that regenerates when first landing after being destroyed (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Destruction Bullet Behavior ID
Fields.Description: Action parameter of [bullet] at the time of destruction (-1: does not occur). Please note that there is an offset specification due to laps. ([GR] SEQ35556)

Fields.Name: Destruction Bullet Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Location of [bullet] at the time of destruction Damipoli ID (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Hidden Debris - Wait Time
Fields.Description: Hidden debris Waiting time (seconds)

Fields.Name: Hidden Debris - Time to Hide
Fields.Description: Time to hide debris (seconds)

Fields.Name: Destruction AI Sound ID
Fields.Description: AI sound ID generated at the time of destruction

Fields.Name: Destruction Item Lot Type
Fields.Description: A type that decides how to obtain items drawn at the time of destruction

Fields.Name: Anim Break ID Max
Fields.Description: What is the animation destruction ID from 0 to what?

Fields.Name: Destruction Bullet Attribute Damage Type
Fields.Description: Generates a bullet if the last damage received when destroying an asset meets the conditions of this setting.

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed on Player Collision
Fields.Description: Broken when the player touches (0: no, 1:)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed on Enemy Collision
Fields.Description: Broken when an enemy character touches (0: No, 1: Ru)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed by Riding
Fields.Description: Will it break if the character gets on (0: it won't break 1: it will break)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed by Default
Fields.Description: Broken at the initial appearance of the player (0: ru, 1: no)

Fields.Name: Is Animated Destruction
Fields.Description: Is it animation destruction (0: physical destruction, 1: animation destruction)

Fields.Name: Is Damage Transferred
Fields.Description: Whether to pass the damage to the other side when receiving damage (0: pass, 1: do not pass)

Fields.Name: Is Attack Backlash
Fields.Description: Do you play the attack (0: do not play, 1: play)

Fields.Name: Is Ladder
Fields.Description: Is it a ladder (0: different, 1: yes)

Fields.Name: Is Moving Object
Fields.Description: Is it a moving object? It is a flag used for branching of movement processing at the time of multi (0: different, 1: yes)

Fields.Name: Is Celestial Sphere
Fields.Description: Processing that treats the celestial sphere (player tracking, etc.) is performed (0: different, 1: yes)

Fields.Name: Is Paused during Cutscene
Fields.Description: Do you want to stop the animation during the poly play (0: not, 1: do)

Fields.Name: Is Flammable
Fields.Description: Will it burn (0: not, 1:)

Fields.Name: Is Repicked
Fields.Description: If this flag is , the parameter At the time of recollection _ *** will be used for the assets to be collected again in units of placement.

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed on Pickup
Fields.Description: If , play the animation at the time of collection, if , destroy at the time of collection (destroy in all cases including replacement)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed by Giant Collision
Fields.Description: Broken when a giant enemy touches (0: No, 1:)

Fields.Name: Pre-destruction Navmesh Flag
Fields.Description: Navigation mesh flag set from assets before destruction

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Interval
Fields.Description: Interval (frame) to generate bullets for spreading fire

Fields.Name: Camera Distance to Update Cloth
Fields.Description: Distance from the camera to update havokCloth (0: always update)

Fields.Name: Duration after Creation until Disappearance
Fields.Description: Runtime-generated time after creation until disappearance (0: does not disappear)

Fields.Name: Contact SE ID
Fields.Description: SE ID to play when touched by a local player operated by you (-1: Do not play)

Fields.Name: Repick Anim ID Offset
Fields.Description: When recollecting assets with Is there a change at the time of recollection? In units of placement, play the uncollected / collected animation with the anime ID offset by this value.

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Rate - Before Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind coefficient (before destruction)

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Rate - After Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind coefficient (after destruction)

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Type - Before Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind effect type (before destruction)

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Type - After Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind effect type (after destruction)

Fields.Name: Override Material ID
Fields.Description: Asset material ID overwrite setting (-1: Do not overwrite model material ID 0 or more: Material ID overwrite) On the ladder, the material ID is reflected only with this setting

Fields.Name: Automatic Generation Height Offset
Fields.Description: Height offset of how much it floats from where the raycast hits the map when it is automatically generated [m]

Fields.Name: Burn Time
Fields.Description: Burning time (seconds) (continues to burn at 0)

Fields.Name: Burn Destroy Rate
Fields.Description: Burnup threshold for switching to the ruptured state

Fields.Name: Burn SFX ID [0]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion: 0 (-1: No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn SFX ID [1]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion: 1 (-1: No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn SFX ID [2]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion: 2 (-1: No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn SFX ID [3]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion: 3 (-1: No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Minimum Delay Time [0]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Minimum Delay Time [1]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Minimum Delay Time [2]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Minimum Delay Time [3]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Maximum Delay Time [0]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Maximum Delay Time [1]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Maximum Delay Time [2]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Maximum Delay Time [3]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Behavior ID [0]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning: 0 (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Behavior ID [1]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning: 1 (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Behavior ID [2]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning: 2 (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Behavior ID [3]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning: 3 (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Delay Time
Fields.Description: Time to delay the generation of bullets for fire spread (seconds)

Fields.Name: Paint Decal Target Texture Size
Fields.Description: Paint decal target size 0: Decal disabled (0 to 4096 power of 2 0, 2, 4, 8, 2048 only valid)

Fields.Name: Post-destruction Navmesh Flag
Fields.Description: Navimesh flag set from the destroyed asset

Fields.Name: Near Camera Behavior Type
Fields.Description: Drawing settings when approaching the camera. [GR] SEQ07529

Fields.Name: Destroyed Item Lot Param ID
Fields.Description: Item to be drawn at the time of destruction Lottery ID_for map-1: No lottery

Fields.Name: Pickup Action Button Param ID
Fields.Description: Action button ID issued for collection-1: Collection function is disabled

Fields.Name: Pickup Item Lot Param ID
Fields.Description: Item to be drawn at the time of collection For lottery ID_map-1: Collection function is invalid

Fields.Name: Auto Draw Group: Backface Check
Fields.Description: Automatic drawing group_Back side check

Fields.Name: Auto Draw Group: Depth Write
Fields.Description: Auto drawing group_shield

Fields.Name: Auto Draw Group: Shadow Test
Fields.Description: Automatic drawing group_shadow test

Fields.Name: Is Height Check Enabled
Fields.Description: Debug_Allow Ground Height Check See SEQ07876 for details

Fields.Name: Exclude from Subfloor Navmesh if below Hit
Fields.Description: If it is placed lower than the hit on the floor (ground), set whether to exclude it from the underfloor navigation mesh deletion target Refer to from the tool

Fields.Name: Block Navmesh Combine
Fields.Description: The set assets are excluded from the target of joining hit parts when building the Nav Mesh.

Fields.Name: Navmesh Flag Apply Type
Fields.Description: Where to apply the navigation mesh flag set from the asset

Fields.Name: Navmesh Flag Apply Type - Destroyed
Fields.Description: Where to apply the navigation mesh flag set from the destroyed asset

Fields.Name: Auto Draw Group: Pass Pixel Number
Fields.Description: Automatic drawing group_Pass pixel (set to 0.0-1.0 to enlarge at the time of shooting)

Fields.Name: Pickup Replacement - Event Flag
Fields.Description: When this event flag is ON, use the ID of the subsequent replacement 0: Do not always replace

Fields.Name: Pickup Replacement - Anim ID Offset
Fields.Description: When Collecting_replacement flag condition is ON, play the uncollected / collected animation with the animation ID offset by this value.

Fields.Name: Pickup Replacement - Action Button Param ID
Fields.Description: This action button ID is used when Collecting_replacement flag condition is ON.

Fields.Name: Pickup Replacement - Item Lot Param ID
Fields.Description: When Collecting_replacement flag condition is ON, this item lottery ID_map is used.

Fields.Name: Sliding Bullet Hit Type
Fields.Description: When a bullet of the follow-up type Crawling on the ground even if it collides collides with an asset, does it bend in the direction along the landing point? Behavior

Fields.Name: Is Damaged by Special Attacks
Fields.Description: Assets can only be damaged by damage to bushes  and object attack power> defense power attacks [GR] SEQ20617

Fields.Name: Penetration Bullet Type
Fields.Description: Will the bullet hit and land? Which bullet para to refer to when deciding? The value that determines.

Fields.Name: Destruction - Sound SE Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID of the place where the destruction sound is played (-1: Placement position)

Fields.Name: Debug - Height Check Minimum
Fields.Description: Debug_Allowable ground height_Minimum [m] See SEQ07876 for details. Must be smaller than maximum

Fields.Name: Debug - Height Check Maximum
Fields.Description: Debug_Allowable ground height_Max [m] See SEQ07876 for details. Must be larger than minimum

Fields.Name: Repick - Action Button ID
Fields.Description: This action button ID is used when recollecting assets whose Is there a change at the time of recollection?

Fields.Name: Repick - Item Lot Param ID
Fields.Description: Assets with Is there a change at the time of recollection? Are used for this item lottery ID_map when recollecting in units of placement.

Fields.Name: Repick Replacement - Anim ID Offset
Fields.Description: Use this parameter instead of At the time of collection_replacement animation offset at the time of recollection for assets whose Is there a change at the time of recollection?

Fields.Name: Repick Replacement - Action Button Param ID
Fields.Description: Use this parameter instead of At the time of collection_replacement action button ID when recollecting assets whose Is there a change at the time of recollection?

Fields.Name: Repick Replacement - Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: Use this parameter instead of At the time of collection_Replacement item lottery ID_For map when recollecting assets whose Is there a change at the time of recollection?

Fields.Name: Is Hit Carver Generation Blocked
Fields.Description: Asset with this set does not create Carver

Fields.Name: Is Giant Enemy Hit by Destruction
Fields.Description: Overwrite the hit filter after destruction with a collision detection type that does not hit a huge enemy (static  dynamic )

Fields.Name: Is Destruction Synchronized
Fields.Description: If this is x, do not perform initial synchronization, map activation synchronization, asset destruction synchronization during in-game, and the attack of the remote PC will not hit.

Fields.Name: Is Hidden on Repick
Fields.Description: Hide assets if you can't get them by lottery when recollecting by placement unit

Fields.Name: Is Valid for Multiplayer Only
Fields.Description: Is it valid only during multi? Only valid for dynamic assets. (Details: SEQ15087)

Fields.Name: Is Bullet Hit SFX Disabled
Fields.Description: In the case of , the landing SFX does not occur regardless of whether the hit bullet penetrates or lands.

Fields.Name: Is Bloodstain/Sign Enabled before Destruction
Fields.Description: Set whether sign / blood character can be created when on the asset (before destruction) : Possible, : Impossible (Details: SEQ122568)

Fields.Name: Is Bloodstain/Sign Enabled after Destruction
Fields.Description: Set whether sign / blood character can be created when on the asset (after destruction) : Possible, : Impossible (Details: SEQ122568)

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Forbidden Region Type
Fields.Description: Summoning prohibited / intrusion prohibited area generation (Damipoli)

Fields.Name: Resident SE ID [0]
Fields.Description: Sound ID 0 (9 digits) to be resident in the asset (-1: No resident)

Fields.Name: Resident SE ID [1]
Fields.Description: Sound ID 1 (9 digits) to be resident in the asset (-1: No resident)

Fields.Name: Resident SE ID [2]
Fields.Description: Sound ID 2 (9 digits) to be resident in the asset (-1: No resident)

Fields.Name: Resident SE ID [3]
Fields.Description: Sound ID 3 (9 digits) to be resident in the asset (-1: not resident)

Fields.Name: Resident SE ID - Dummy Poly [0]
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID0 to attach resident sound (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Resident SE ID - Dummy Poly [1]
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID1 to attach resident sound (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Resident SE ID - Dummy Poly [2]
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID2 to attach resident sound (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Resident SE ID - Dummy Poly [3]
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID3 to attach resident sound (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Exclude Activate Ratio - Xbox One Grid
Fields.Description: Open_XB1 exclusion rate [GR] SEQ25310

Fields.Name: Exclude Activate Ratio - Xbox One Legacy
Fields.Description: Legacy_XB1 exclusion rate [GR] SEQ25310

Fields.Name: Exclude Activate Ratio - PS4 Grid
Fields.Description: Open_PS4 exclusion rate [GR] SEQ25310

Fields.Name: Exclude Activate Ratio - PS4 Legacy
Fields.Description: Legacy_PS4 exclusion rate [GR] SEQ25310
